headline: Newmont Corp. (NYSE:NEM) Shows Strong High Growth Momentum Setup with Breakout Potential Near $118.31 Resistance
summary: Newmont (NEM) shows strong earnings momentum with 104.8% EPS growth and perfect beat records. With high Technical (8/10) and Setup ratings, it's poised near a $118.31 breakout.
